tasks.subject: Task 0: Initialize git repo and base hygiene files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Git repo on `main` with `.gitignore`, `.editorconfig`, `README.md`, and design/plan docs in initial commit.

```json:metadata
{"files":[".gitignore",".editorconfig","README.md"],"verifyCommand":"git status","acceptanceCriteria":["repo on main","initial commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Go module + package skeletons
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `go.mod` for module github.com/cafecito-games/gogdproto at Go 1.26, plus `internal/*` doc.go skeletons.

```json:metadata
{"files":["go.mod","cmd/gogdproto/main.go","internal/lexer/doc.go","internal/parser/doc.go","internal/ast/doc.go","internal/validator/doc.go","internal/importer/doc.go","internal/gdast/doc.go","internal/generator/doc.go","internal/prototypes/doc.go","internal/cli/doc.go","internal/applog/doc.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build ./... && go vet ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["go.mod has go 1.26","build passes","vet passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Cobra CLI skeleton with --version
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `gogdproto --version` prints `gogdproto 0.1.0`. TDD red/green via `cli.Execute(args, out, errOut)`.

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/cli/root.go","internal/cli/version.go","internal/cli/root_test.go","cmd/gogdproto/main.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/cli/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["--version prints gogdproto 0.1.0","--help exits 0","no-args prints usage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: --log-level flag and component-tagged slog logger
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `applog` package + CLI `--log-level` (default warn) wired through `applog.New` and `applog.For`.

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/applog/applog.go","internal/applog/applog_test.go","internal/cli/root.go","internal/cli/root_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/applog/... ./internal/cli/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["ParseLevel handles all 4 levels case-insensitive","For adds component attr","invalid level fails CLI"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Taskfile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `Taskfile.yml` with build/test/test:cover/lint/fmt/fmt:check/tidy/tidy:check/install/ci tasks. Default = ci.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Taskfile.yml"],"verifyCommand":"task build && ./bin/gogdproto --version","acceptanceCriteria":["task --list shows all tasks","task build produces bin/gogdproto","task test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: golangci-lint v2 configuration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `.golangci.yml` (v2 schema) with the agreed linter set; `task ci` is green.

```json:metadata
{"files":[".golangci.yml"],"verifyCommand":"task ci","acceptanceCriteria":["v2 schema","golangci-lint run exits 0","task ci exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Pre-commit (prek) configuration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `.pre-commit-config.yaml` with pre-commit-hooks + local task hooks. Installed via `prek install`.

```json:metadata
{"files":[".pre-commit-config.yaml"],"verifyCommand":"prek run --all-files","acceptanceCriteria":["prek install succeeds","all hooks pass on current tree"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: GitHub Actions workflow + push + green CI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `.github/workflows/pr.yml` runs `task ci`; pushed branch shows green run; close issue #1.

```json:metadata
{"files":[".github/workflows/pr.yml"],"verifyCommand":"gh run watch --exit-status","acceptanceCriteria":["workflow runs on PR + push:main","Go 1.26 + Task + golangci-lint installed","task ci runs green","coverage.out uploaded","issue #1 closed"]}
```
